positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a friendly, smiling cosmic astronaut floating amongst constellations and planets. The aesthetic is retro-futuristic and whimsical, using clean linework and strong, contrasting silhouettes. The central figure should be easily visible on a neutral background, perfect for apparel printing. Color palette: deep midnight blues, pops of electric teal, soft lavenders, and bright starlight yellow. Composition should be perfectly centered, with the astronaut's pose being approachable and engaging. Vector art style, high contrast, graphic novel quality, no gradient shading, crisp edges, studio lighting, poster art style.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, copyright, signature, multiple characters, bad anatomy, messy, noise, blurry, fuzzy, gradient, low detail
